turns.content: my friend ask me 'Pan what do you do at 4am that is so important' and I realise most people have NO idea what a food vendor morning look like haha. can you help me write it out for Instagram?? I want to do a day-in-my-life post
That would make great content! Behind-the-scenes food vendor posts always do well. Walk me through your typical morning from alarm to first customer and I'll help you shape it into a post.

okay so alarm is 3:45am na ka. yes 3:45!! brush teeth, wash face, apron on, no makeup because who am I trying to impress haha. out the door by 4am. first stop is rice pickup — my supplier deliver near the market for me at 4am sharp. then I go into the market and pick chicken. 40 kilos na ka. I check EVERY one. squeeze it, smell it, look at the colour. bad chicken = angry customers
The image of you hand-inspecting 40 kilos of chicken at 4am is amazing content. How long does the chicken selection take, and then what happens after you've got everything?

chicken take 20-30 minutes because I am very picky na ka. then fresh stuff — ginger, garlic, cucumber, spring onion, coriander — maybe 15 minutes more. by 5am I arrive at my cart. first thing is start the charcoal stove — 30 minutes to get it hot. while it heating I wash chicken, prep garlic and ginger, start the broth. by 5:30 first chicken go in. rice in the cooker with chicken fat and pandan leaf. and then 6:30am — first customer!! everything ready, everything fresh. I say 'sawatdee ka!! khao man gai aroi na ka!!' 😊

So from 3:45am alarm to 6:30am first customer — almost 3 hours of prep before you sell a single plate. That's the kind of thing people have no idea about when they order a 50-baht plate. This would make a fantastic reel. Want me to draft a caption with timestamps?
yes please na ka!! keep it casual like how I talk, not too formal. I have some foreign followers so English is good. maybe put the time for each step so people can see the whole timeline??

Here's a draft:

"What does a khao man gai vendor's morning look like? Let me show you.

3:45am - Alarm. No snooze button when the chicken is waiting.
4:00am - Rice pickup. Check every bag.
4:15am - Market time. 40kg of chicken, hand-picked one by one. I squeeze, I smell, I inspect. No shortcuts.
4:45am - Fresh ginger, garlic, cucumber, herbs. Only the best.
5:00am - Arrive at my cart. Light the charcoal. 30 minutes to heat up.
5:30am - First chicken goes in. Rice cooking in chicken fat and pandan leaf. The smell is already amazing.
6:30am - First customer. Everything fresh, everything ready.

Every plate has 3 hours of love before it reaches you. That's khao man gai made the real way."

Feel free to add your own flavour to it! What do you think?

omg 'no snooze button when the chicken is waiting' haha so good!! I love it na ka. I change some words to make it more me but the structure is perfect. I can film each step and make a reel with the timestamp on screen. this going to get so many likes!! thank you 🙏🙏

A reel with timestamps on screen would be perfect — the 3:45am alarm footage alone will grab attention. Film it over a couple mornings so you can get good angles without slowing down your actual prep. Your followers are going to have a whole new appreciation for that plate of chicken rice! 🙏

good idea na ka film over a few mornings!! because if I try to hold phone while inspecting 40 kilo of chicken I will drop it in the ice box haha 😂 maybe I ask my helper to film some part. okay I am SO excited about this content!!

Having someone else film while you work would look way more natural anyway — action shots of your hands picking chicken and stirring broth are more interesting than selfie-angle footage. Your excitement will come through in the video. Can't wait to see the final reel!

I post it next week na ka!! going to use that trending audio too, the one where it go 'my 9 to 5 is actually a 4 to 5' haha perfect for vendor life. okay goodnight!! time to sleep because 3:45am come FAST 😴🙏
That audio is perfect for your reel! Go get some sleep — 3:45am really does come fast. Sweet dreams of perfectly poached chicken! 😄🙏
haha perfectly poached chicken dreams!! that is literally what I dream about na ka 😂 okay for real goodnight. thank you for helping with the caption. you are my free content manager haha 🙏🙏
Free content manager — I'll add that to my resume! Goodnight, Pan. Can't wait to see that reel blow up. 🙏
